title: Incendium Translation Fix
description: Fixed the incorrect translation keys for some loot items in Incendium's structures, and also resolved critical bugs related to Sentry's Wrath and Firestorm.
body:
# Incendium Translation Fix
**Incendium-Translation-Fix** requires [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium) and [Sparkle](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sparkles) as dependencies.

**Incendium-Translation-Fix** is actually a **data pack** packaged as a **mod**, designed to **fix** the **translation bugs** present in Incendium.

It also **fixes** the **bug** where **Sentry's Wrath** **breaks** **immediately** after being **obtained** by the player — _it was **incorrectly** treated as if it had been used on a **grindstone**_. **Now you can use the item normally!** 

It also **fixes** the **bug** where **Firestorm** becomes **temporarily unusable** after a **missed long-range** shot—**now Firestorm truly lives up to its name!**

It has also increased the height limit of the Nether to **1024** blocks.

It should be **compatible** with **all versions** that support Incendium _(I haven’t tested them all, so feel free to report any issues you encounter)_.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

<In fact, it currently only supports Minecraft version 1.19 and above.>

</details>

These are the **affected items** (Chinese translation examples included):

**Ragnarok**

![诸神黄昏](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53ca3ca2c8beb2211934b63036211f80b9f4195e_0.webp)

**Daybreaker**

![破晓者](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c38ec9907b2f928a808125d9b66ada66351ec571_0.webp)

**Sentry's Wrath**

![哨兵之怒](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/472c7cedbdd4495592aee8f63269a5bf9a8157b2_0.webp)

**Withersbane**

![凋零克星](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31657326392b11d8bf2ac9fac28fe833eaa5171b_0.webp)

**Voltaic Trident**

![伏特三叉戟](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ce3d33a113fd36eabe93158139b18c76fed8be8_0.webp)

**Hefty Pickaxe**

![重型十字镐](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f649ea290a712715abd89fc8820cf0c7fa8b052_0.webp)

**Multiplex Crossbow**

![多重十字弩](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4c2aea933288fd39853c310e129919cd548dc1e_0.webp)

**Blazing Hatchet**

![炽燃战斧](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7958eca9fe57f6d7b4010f38d4f41cba9ff91a1_0.webp)

**Suspicious Brew**

![可疑药水](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c93469fc8ca9cdbb1009d0fd62ccb0b2a04e5286_0.webp)

 
## Note
### that this mod does **not** provide any translations — **all translation content** is sourced from [Sparkle](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sparkles)!
### 
### This mod will **not take effect** on items **already obtained**!

### This mod has **not obtained** official authorization from Incendium. If it constitutes an **infringement**, please contact me!
